---
title: "Wesley Kai Zheng"
image: "assets/avatar.jpg"

about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-width: 80%
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/WKaiZ
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:wzheng0302@berkeley.edu
      target: _blank   
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/wesley-zheng-cal
      target: _blank
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-VW_lKwAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
    # - icon: twitter-x
    #   text: Twitter
    #   href: https://x.com/WesleyZheng
    #   target: _blank   
    # - icon: wechat
    #   text: WeChat
    #   href: assets/wechat.JPG
    #   target: _blank 
    # - icon: steam
    #   text: Steam
    #   href: https://steamcommunity.com/id/wes246/
    #   target: _blank 
    # - icon: book-fill
    #   text: RedNote
    #   href: https://www.xiaohongshu.com/user/profile/63f1fcbe000000001001e07e
    #   target: _blank

listing:
    contents: 
      - links.yml
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 3
    fields: [image, date, title]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

Hello! Welcome to my personal site! I am a fourth-year student at UC Berkeley, studying Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, and Data Science.  

My current research interests lie in artificial intelligence and database systems, where I have the privilege of working under the guidance of Professor [Alvin Cheung](https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~akcheung/) and collaborating closely with, and being mentored by, [Qiuyang Mang](https://joyemang33.github.io/) and [Hans Mao](https://huanzhimao.com/).

I am also currently a TA for [CS 189: Introduction to Machine Learning](https://eecs189.org/). Previously, I have served as a TA for [Data 8: Foundations of Data Science](https://www.data8.org/), [Data 100: Principles and Techniques of Data Science](https://ds100.org/), and [CS 188: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence](https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs188/).

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const about = document.querySelector(".quarto-about-trestles .about-entity");
  if (!about) return;

  const links = about.querySelector(".about-links");
  if (!links) return;

  const img = document.createElement("img");
  img.className = "home-rotating-drawing";
  img.alt = "Drawing";
  links.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", img);

  const candidates = [
    "assets/drawing1.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing2.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing3.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing4.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing5.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing6.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing7.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing8.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing9.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing10.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing11.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing12.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing13.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing14.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing15.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing16.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing17.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing18.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing19.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing20.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing21.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing22.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing23.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing24.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing25.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing26.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing27.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing28.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing29.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing30.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing31.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing32.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing34.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing35.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing36.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing37.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing38.jpeg",
    "assets/drawing39.png",
    "assets/drawing40.png",
    "assets/drawing41.png",
    "assets/drawing42.png",
  ];

  const pickIndex = () => {
    if (window.crypto?.getRandomValues) {
      const u = new Uint32Array(1);
      window.crypto.getRandomValues(u);
      return u[0] % candidates.length;
    }
    return Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length);
  };

  const key = "homeAvatarLastIndex:v1";
  const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key);
  const lastIdx = raw == null ? -1 : Number.parseInt(raw, 10);

  let idx = pickIndex();
  if (candidates.length > 1 && Number.isFinite(lastIdx) && idx === lastIdx) {
    idx = (idx + 1) % candidates.length;
  }

  const picked = candidates[idx];
  window.localStorage.setItem(key, String(idx));

  const reveal = () => {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      img.style.opacity = "1";
    });
  };

  const preload = new Image();
  preload.onload = () => {
    img.src = picked;
    reveal();
  };
  preload.onerror = () => {
    reveal();
  };
  preload.src = picked;
});
</script>
```
